items.summary: 十九年前懷着推動這項運動發展的承諾來到洛杉磯後，大衛·貝克漢至今仍在幫助向美國推廣足球。
items.title: 貝克漢為何成為世界盃在美國的門面人物

items.title: Health worker monitored for Ebola in London hospital after working in DRC

items.summary: On Monday, District 9 and Gran Turismo director Neill Blomkamp unveiled his latest project: a 13-minute sci-fi short titled Nightborne that's loosely based on Peter Watts' 2014 novel Echopraxia. The short comes from Blomkamp's new AI startup / production company, Barley Studios, and features…
items.title: Neill Blomkamp’s new zombie AI ‘film’ is just slop warmed over

items.summary: OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing.
